caption:
making waves at @galaxymacau Grand Resort Deck ✨🏖💦👙🛟✨ 

📍Grand Resort Deck houses the world’s longest Skytop quantic river ride, largest Skytop wave pool, splashing out at Waterslide Mountain, Water Zorbing roller, chill at white sand beach, lagoon or private cabanas, some family time at kids zone & enjoy music by Live DJ in the afternoon 

#GalaxyMacau #GrandResortDeck #MakeWaves #ColorfulSummer
🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2
